rationale: Review 2 identifies the more fundamental generality defect: `AffineAlgGroup` is pinned to `[Field k]` even though its two projections (`FiniteType`, `IsGeometricallyReduced`) work over any `CommRing k` — directly confirmable from lines 31–36 of the diff. Review 1 only catches the weaker downstream issue (`IsUnipotent` inheriting `Field`); acting on Review 2 lifts the foundational class to its correct level of generality, which subsumes and supersedes Review 1's finding.
